text:
There once was a very old owl who lived in an old owl hole high up in an old oak tree. Old Owl loved flying. He loved soaring over woodland forests.

One autumn day, a young fox wanted to fly. This fox wasn took old owl feathers.

Old owl didn't mind.

They flew all day until night. Old fox couldn't sleep. Old owl put him under an owl sleepy spell.

You'll sleep right out.

They slept all night. Early morning.

The fox woke up.

There was an owl owl owl hunt.

They didn't catch it.

They made a vow.

They wouldn't fly that way again.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
